prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a female cosplayer at a {argument name="setting" default="crowded anime convention hall"}. She has long {argument name="hair color" default="teal"} hair, {argument name="eye color" default="heterochromia, one blue and one amber"} eyes, and wears {argument name="headwear" default="deer antlers and a small purple crown"} with a yellow rose clip. Her outfit is a {argument name="outfit style" default="teal two-piece idol costume with ruffled skirt"}, gold trim, wave patterns, gem choker, black fingerless gloves, and fishnet tights. She poses with a peace sign and one hand on her hip against a blurred background of convention attendees and bokeh lighting.
translatedPrompt: 一位女性 Cosplayer 在 {argument name="setting" default="拥挤的动漫展厅"} 的照片级写实肖像。她留着长长的 {argument name="hair color" default="青色"} 头发，有着 {argument name="eye color" default="异色瞳，一只蓝色一只琥珀色"} 的眼睛，佩戴着 {argument name="headwear" default="鹿角和小巧的紫色皇冠"} 以及黄色玫瑰发夹。她的装扮是 {argument name="outfit style" default="青色两件套偶像服装，配有荷叶边裙摆"}，带有金色饰边、波浪纹样、宝石颈圈、黑色露指手套和渔网袜。她摆出剪刀手姿势，一只手叉腰，背景是模糊的漫展参与者和虚化灯光。

breakdown.creativeCore: 漫展 Cosplayer 肖像：生成一张在繁忙漫展上摆姿势的 Cosplayer 照片级写实图像，非常适合角色可视化或活动摄影样机。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
